message:
test(fwc): add 142 intent compiler tests + fix compilation errors

- Add comprehensive test coverage for intent.rs: parse_literals, extract_quoted,
  extract_zone, normalize_text, contains_term, match_first, infer_action (all
  families), infer_resource, infer_connector_candidates, operation hints (github,
  messaging, notion, issue_tracker, gmail, calendar, storage, airtable, figma,
  stripe, crm, query, llm), generic_operation_hint, shell_join/quote,
  identifier_heavy, confidence_for, status_for, connector_evidence, action_evidence,
  ConnectorCandidate Display, IntentMode, compile integration tests, curated_connector,
  search_argv, payload_missing, missing_payload_message, step builder
- Fix main.rs: escape quotes in const strings, use intent::shell_join
- Fix workflow.rs: partial move in task list (hoist borrows before move), const fn
- fwc intent tests: 5 → 147 (from 6 total fwc tests to 170)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
